title: Document service high latency
root_cause: Connection pool exhaustion due to leaked connections in async handler

title: Search service unreachable
root_cause: MeiliSearch OOM killed - index size exceeded pod memory limit

title: File upload timeouts for >50MB files
root_cause: S3 multipart upload threshold misconfigured after terraform apply

title: Notification delivery delays
root_cause: SQS consumer batch size too large causing processing bottleneck

title: JWT validation failures on API gateway
root_cause: JWT signing key rotation did not propagate to all gateway replicas

title: Collab service websocket disconnects
root_cause: Redis pub/sub connection dropped during cluster failover

title: Audit event ingestion lag >30min
root_cause: DynamoDB write throttling - provisioned capacity insufficient for audit spike

title: Admin dashboard 502 errors
root_cause: Ruby process memory leak in admin report generation endpoint

title: Data pipeline stale - no new events for 4h
root_cause: Airflow scheduler pod evicted - disk pressure on worker node

title: SSL certificate expiring in 24h
root_cause: cert-manager renewal job failed silently - ACME rate limit hit
